use_cases: Chat and messaging application interfaces for real-time communication
Comment and feedback systems in web applications
Customer support ticket and live chat widgets
Team collaboration and internal communication tools
ai_summary: A reusable message input block component for chat and messaging interfaces. Features user avatar support using Radix UI primitives with a clean, minimal design. Provides the core input mechanism for sending text messages in conversational UI patterns, commonly used in SaaS platforms, social applications, and customer support tools.
